description: Legal testimony. In Hebrew. Dating: Late, probably no earlier than 15th or 16th century. Unfinished and unsigned. Esther bt. Elʿazar b. Pinḥas, the wife of Yosef b. Moshe b. Asher makes a declaration concerning the business partnership between her father and her husband.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
